rule.description: Always implement a response with the status code '400 Bad Request' if the method contains parameters (in case of invalid syntax).

Always implement a response with the status code '406 Not Acceptable' in case the sever does not support the 'Accept' header specified in the request. Only applies to routes that respond with content.
Always implement a response with the status code '422 Unprocessable Content' if the method contains parameters (in case of invalid semantics).
Never implement a response with the status code '401 Unauthorized' if the specification does not contains an authentication mechanism.
Always implement a response with the status code '400 Bad Request' if the method contains parameters (in case of invalid syntax).
Always implement a response with the status code '404 Not Found' if the method contains path parameters.
